<?php namespace Aws\MarketplaceEntitlementService; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS Marketplace Entitlement Service** service. * @method \Aws\Result getEntitlements(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise getEntitlementsAsync(array $args = []) */ class MarketplaceEntitlementServiceClient extends AwsClient {}
